summary: Tested Blog CMS end-to-end. Backend pytest suite (16 tests) covers public list/get, 404, auth gates (401/403), create/duplicate-409/invalid-slug-400, patch update + persistence, reindex (401/200/404), delete + persistence, admin password gate (200/403), and IndexNow key file. All 16 passed. Frontend Playwright run verified /blog renders 11 cards (incl. blog-card-land-lease-palm-bay-florida), /blog/land-lease-palm-bay-florida renders H1+content (not stuck on Loading), IndexNow .txt served by React, /admin password gate, Blogs tab renders 11 rows with API key loaded, New Blog button enabled, reindex toast 'Re-pinging Google + IndexNow…' appears, create flow (auto-slug, save → row appears) works, delete with window.confirm dialog removes row. qa-test-blog-001 and qa-ui-test-* slugs cleaned up; list confirmed back to 11 blogs.

issues: Lead-capture popup ('Find Your Perfect Property') overlays the admin password form on load — testing agent had to press Escape to dismiss. Real admin users may have to dismiss the popup every time before entering the password. Consider suppressing the popup on /admin routes.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress lead-capture popup on /admin and /blog/* routes so admin/article views are not obscured.
(Optional) Add data-testid to the admin password input + submit button in ProtectedAdmin.jsx for more stable automation.
Reminder per request brief: Google Indexing API currently returns 403 (service account not added as Search Console owner) — tests intentionally only assert indexingPing='queued'.
critical_code_review_comments: indexing.py uses sync `requests` inside `run_in_executor` — acceptable, but consider `httpx.AsyncClient` for a fully-async pipeline.

blogs.py invalid-slug validation runs AFTER Pydantic (which already enforces min_length=3). Strings with uppercase/spaces still reach _validate_slug and return 400 correctly, but pattern could be moved into Pydantic Field(pattern=...) for earlier rejection.

AdminBlogsTab.jsx fetches the BLOG_API_KEY via POST with the admin password in the body — this works but the key is then held in React state and used as Bearer for every CRUD call. Acceptable for an internal admin page; flag if exposure surface grows.

Background tasks use `loop.run_in_executor` in indexing.notify_search_engines but `_ping_async` is added as a `BackgroundTasks` task — FastAPI runs background tasks after response, so this is correct fire-and-forget behaviour.
Static fallback in Blog.jsx/BlogPost.jsx is well-implemented (seeds initial state from blogContent.js for instant render, then upgrades to API data).
test_credentials: Admin password PalmBay2024!  |  Blog Bearer token M-quMx2zP7boDfUQ5jahRdSPJYciiAv4a2-Kt5FC60I
seed_data_creation: Created and then DELETED qa-test-blog-001 (backend) and qa-ui-test-* (frontend). Production blog count verified back at 11.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_blogs_api.py — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_blogs_api.py -v`. It cleans up after itself. For frontend admin testing remember to press Escape (or dismiss the lead-capture popup) before filling the admin password — the popup overlays the form on first load.
